summary: Backend testing completed for suspended stores (is_suspended field) and AI chatbot with OpenAI GPT-4o. All 18 tests passed successfully.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Suspended stores and AI chatbot features fully tested and working. is_suspended field is present in /api/food/stores response. AI chatbot uses OpenAI GPT-4o via emergentintegrations library.

suspended_stores_api.details: GET /api/food/stores returns is_suspended field for all stores. Suspended stores have is_open=False and open_status='متوقف مؤقتاً'. Stores are sorted with suspended stores at the end.

ai_chatbot_send.details: POST /api/ai-chatbot/send works correctly. Returns session_id, response, quick_replies, category, needs_human fields. AI responds in Arabic with relevant information.

ai_chatbot_authentication.details: Chatbot endpoints correctly require authentication (401/403 without token)

ai_chatbot_session_continuity.details: Chatbot maintains session continuity when session_id is provided

ai_chatbot_history.details: GET /api/ai-chatbot/history returns list of messages. Can be filtered by session_id.

quick_questions.details: GET /api/ai-chatbot/quick-questions returns 7 predefined questions with icons

request_support.details: POST /api/ai-chatbot/request-support creates support ticket and returns request_id

api_endpoints_verified: GET /api/food/stores - Returns stores with is_suspended field
GET /api/food/stores/{store_id} - Returns single store with is_suspended field
POST /api/ai-chatbot/send - Sends message to AI chatbot (requires auth)

ai_chatbot.question: ما هي طرق الدفع المتاحة؟
ai_chatbot.response_preview: طرق الدفع المتاحة لدينا هي: المحفظة الإلكترونية، والتي تعطي نقاط ولاء لكل عملية شراء - شام كاش
